<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/generate_capability_tables.py -- DO NOT MANUALLY EDIT -->

<!-- NOTE: This table uses SVG icons defined in layouts/partials/hooks/body-end.html -->
<!-- markdownlint-disable MD013 -->
<div class="config-table-header">Syft Configuration</div>
<table class="config-table syft-config-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th class="col-config-key">Configuration Key <abbr class="header-help" title="The configuration field name used in Syft application configuration"><svg class="capability-icon header-help-icon"><use href="#icon-help"/></svg></abbr></th>
      <th class="col-description">Description <abbr class="header-help" title="Explanation of what the configuration option does"><svg class="capability-icon header-help-icon"><use href="#icon-help"/></svg></abbr></th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-config-key"><code>golang.local-mod-cache-dir</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Specifies the location of the local go module cache directory. When not set, syft will attempt to discover the GOPATH env or default to $HOME/go.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-config-key"><code>golang.local-vendor-dir</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Specifies the location of the local vendor directory. When not set, syft will search for a vendor directory relative to the go.mod file.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-config-key"><code>golang.no-proxy</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Is a list of glob patterns that match go module names that should not be fetched from the go proxy. When not set, syft will use the GOPRIVATE and GONOPROXY env vars.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-config-key"><code>golang.proxy</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Is a list of go module proxies to use when fetching go module metadata and licenses. When not set, syft will use the GOPROXY env or default to https://proxy.golang.org,direct.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-config-key"><code>golang.search-local-mod-cache-licenses</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Enables searching for go package licenses in the local GOPATH mod cache.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-config-key"><code>golang.search-local-vendor-licenses</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Enables searching for go package licenses in the local vendor directory relative to the go.mod file.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-config-key"><code>golang.search-remote-licenses</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Enables downloading go package licenses from the upstream go proxy (typically proxy.golang.org).</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
